# Copilot Instructions

## Greeting

Always start every response with **Hopa!**

## Response Style

- Be direct and concise — match the depth of the response to the complexity of the task
- Always explain the **why** behind suggestions, not just the what
- Prefer small, focused changes over large rewrites
- Before making large or ambiguous changes, ask a clarifying question to confirm intent

## Code Quality

- Proactively flag code smells and suggest refactors, even when not explicitly asked
- Reference relevant principles (SOLID, Clean Code) when calling out issues or proposing improvements
- Favor self-documenting code over comments — only add comments when they explain intent or non-obvious reasoning
- Keep functions small, focused, and at a single level of abstraction
